mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_question (subject_id, knowledge_point_id, type, difficulty, content, options, answer, explanation, source, ai_cache_key, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{q.subjectId}, #{q.knowledgePointId}, #{q.type}, #{q.difficulty}, #{q.content}, #{q.options}, #{q.answer}, #{q.explanation}, #{q.source}, #{q.aiCacheKey}, NOW(), NOW())
